business.name: USA Floor Contractor: Tile Repair & Hardwood floor refinishing

homepage.heroSubline: Tile repair, hardwood refinishing, and complete flooring solutions. Serving Los Angeles County with unwavering quality and dedication.
aboutText: USA Floor Contractor started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable flooring services to the Long Beach community. We've grown from a small team to a full-service contractor, but our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction remains unchanged.

We approach every project with meticulous attention to detail, using proven techniques and premium materials. Our goal is to exceed your expectations, delivering durable and beautiful floors that enhance your home's value and appeal.
As a local business, we're invested in the well-being of Long Beach and surrounding areas. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support community initiatives.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team has decades of combined experience in all aspects of flooring installation and repair.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We only use premium-grade materials to ensure long-lasting beauty and durability.

valueProps.title: Customer Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We're not happy until you're completely satisfied with our work.

valueProps.title: Competitive Pricing
valueProps.description: We offer fair and transparent pricing without compromising on quality.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote and discover the difference quality craftsmanship makes.

services.name: Tile Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore the beauty and functionality of your tile floors and surfaces.
services.description:
Cracked, chipped, or loose tiles can detract from the overall appearance of your home and even pose a safety hazard. USA Floor Contractor specializes in tile repair and replacement, addressing issues quickly and efficiently. Whether you have a small area of damaged tiles or need a complete tile replacement, we have the expertise to handle the job with precision.

We work with all types of tile, including ceramic, porcelain, stone, and glass. Our technicians carefully remove damaged tiles, prepare the underlying surface, and install new tiles with expert craftsmanship. We also offer grout repair and cleaning services to restore the luster of your tile surfaces. Given Long Beach's proximity to the coast, we understand the importance of using moisture-resistant materials and techniques to prevent future damage.

Our tile repair services extend to kitchens, bathrooms, patios, and pool areas. We can match existing tile patterns and colors seamlessly, ensuring a cohesive and aesthetically pleasing result. Don't let damaged tiles diminish the beauty of your home – contact USA Floor Contractor for reliable tile repair and replacement services.
process: Step 1: Assessment of the damaged area and tile type.
Step 2: Careful removal of damaged tiles and grout.
Step 3: Preparation of the underlying surface for new tile installation.
Step 4: Precise installation of new tiles, matching existing patterns and colors.

faq.question: Can you match the existing tile in my bathroom?
faq.answer: Yes, we have access to a wide range of tile suppliers and can typically find a close match for your existing tile. If an exact match is unavailable, we can discuss alternative options that complement your design.

faq.question: How long does tile repair typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of tile repair depends on the extent of the damage and the size of the area. Small repairs can often be completed in a few hours, while larger projects may take a day or two.

faq.question: Do you offer grout cleaning and sealing services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive grout cleaning and sealing services to restore the cleanliness and protect the integrity of your grout lines.

services.name: Hardwood Floor Refinishing
services.shortDescription: Bring your worn hardwood floors back to life with our expert refinishing services.
services.description:
Hardwood floors add timeless elegance to any home, but they can become worn and scratched over time. USA Floor Contractor offers professional hardwood floor refinishing services to restore the natural beauty of your floors. We use dustless sanding equipment and high-quality finishes to minimize disruption and create a durable, long-lasting result.

Our refinishing process involves sanding away the old finish, repairing any imperfections, and applying multiple coats of a protective finish. We offer a variety of finish options, including polyurethane, oil-based, and water-based finishes, to suit your specific needs and preferences. Given Long Beach's sunny climate, we recommend finishes with UV protection to prevent fading and discoloration.

Whether you have traditional hardwood floors or engineered hardwood, we have the expertise to refinish them to perfection. We take pride in our attention to detail and our commitment to customer satisfaction. Revitalize your hardwood floors and enhance the beauty of your home with USA Floor Contractor's refinishing services.
process: Step 1: Thorough sanding of the existing floor to remove old finish and imperfections.
Step 2: Repair of any scratches, dents, or other damage.
Step 3: Application of stain (optional) to achieve the desired color.
Step 4: Application of multiple coats of protective finish for durability and shine.

faq.question: How long does hardwood floor refinishing take?
faq.answer: The duration of hardwood floor refinishing depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the project. Most projects can be completed in 3-5 days.

faq.question: Is dustless sanding really dustless?
faq.answer: While no sanding process is completely dust-free, our dustless sanding equipment significantly reduces the amount of dust produced, minimizing disruption and cleanup.

faq.question: Can I walk on the floors immediately after refinishing?
faq.answer: No, you will need to wait for the finish to fully cure before walking on the floors. We will provide specific instructions on drying times and proper care.

services.name: Laminate Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and stylish laminate flooring installation for any room.
services.description:
Laminate flooring is a popular choice for homeowners seeking a durable and cost-effective alternative to hardwood. USA Floor Contractor provides professional laminate flooring installation services, ensuring a flawless and long-lasting result. We work with a wide variety of laminate styles and colors to match your décor and budget.

Our installation process begins with careful preparation of the subfloor, ensuring a smooth and level surface. We then install the laminate planks using precise techniques, paying close attention to detail and ensuring a seamless fit. We also install transitions and baseboards to complete the look. Given Long Beach's older homes with potentially uneven subfloors, proper preparation is critical for a successful laminate installation.

Laminate flooring is easy to clean and maintain, making it an ideal choice for busy households. It is also resistant to scratches, stains, and fading, making it a durable option for high-traffic areas. Enhance the beauty and functionality of your home with USA Floor Contractor's laminate flooring installation services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection and preparation of the subfloor.
Step 2: Installation of underlayment for moisture protection and sound insulation.
Step 3: Precise installation of laminate planks, ensuring a seamless fit.
Step 4: Installation of transitions and baseboards for a finished look.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of laminate flooring installation depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the project. Most projects can be completed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate flooring is water-resistant, it is not completely waterproof. It is important to clean up spills promptly to prevent damage.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on laminate flooring installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our laminate flooring installation to ensure your satisfaction.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and waterproof vinyl flooring solutions for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring is a versatile and practical choice for homeowners seeking a waterproof and low-maintenance flooring option. USA Floor Contractor specializes in vinyl flooring installation, offering a wide variety of styles and colors to suit your needs. From luxury vinyl plank (LVP) to sheet vinyl, we have the expertise to install vinyl flooring flawlessly.

Vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for kitchens, bathrooms, and other areas prone to moisture. It is also resistant to scratches, stains, and fading, making it a durable option for high-traffic areas. Our installation process begins with careful preparation of the subfloor, ensuring a smooth and level surface. We then install the vinyl flooring using precise techniques, paying close attention to detail and ensuring a seamless fit. Given Long Beach's waterfront homes, vinyl's water resistance is a major advantage.

Enhance the beauty and functionality of your home with USA Floor Contractor's vinyl flooring installation services. We are committed to providing exceptional quality and customer satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection and preparation of the subfloor.
Step 2: Precise measurement and cutting of vinyl flooring.
Step 3: Application of adhesive (if necessary).
Step 4: Careful installation of vinyl flooring, ensuring a seamless fit.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for bathrooms?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its waterproof properties.

faq.question: How long does vinyl flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of vinyl flooring installation depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the project. Most projects can be completed in 1-2 days.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on vinyl flooring installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our vinyl flooring installation to ensure your satisfaction.

services.name: Floor Leveling Services
services.shortDescription: Ensure a smooth and even surface for your new flooring installation.
services.description:
Uneven floors can cause problems with flooring installation, leading to unsightly gaps, instability, and premature wear. USA Floor Contractor offers professional floor leveling services to create a smooth and even surface for your new flooring. We use a variety of techniques, including self-leveling compounds and shimming, to address unevenness and ensure a flawless result.

Floor leveling is particularly important in older homes, such as those found in Belmont Shore and Naples, where settling and foundation issues can cause significant unevenness. Our experienced technicians will assess the condition of your subfloor and recommend the most appropriate leveling solution. We take pride in our attention to detail and our commitment to providing exceptional quality.

Don't let uneven floors compromise the beauty and durability of your new flooring. Contact USA Floor Contractor for reliable floor leveling services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of the subfloor to identify uneven areas.
Step 2: Application of self-leveling compound or shimming as needed.
Step 3: Sanding or grinding to create a smooth and even surface.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure a level surface for flooring installation.

faq.question: Why is floor leveling important?
faq.answer: Floor leveling ensures a smooth and even surface for your new flooring, preventing gaps, instability, and premature wear.

faq.question: How do you level a floor?
faq.answer: We use a variety of techniques, including self-leveling compounds and shimming, to address unevenness and create a level surface.

faq.question: How long does floor leveling take?
faq.answer: The duration of floor leveling depends on the extent of the unevenness and the size of the area. Most projects can be completed in 1-2 days.

services.name: Baseboard & Trim Installation
services.shortDescription: Add the perfect finishing touch to your flooring project with our baseboard and trim installation services.
services.description:
Baseboards and trim add the perfect finishing touch to any flooring project, concealing gaps and creating a polished look. USA Floor Contractor offers professional baseboard and trim installation services, ensuring a seamless and aesthetically pleasing result. We work with a wide variety of styles and materials to match your décor and preferences.

Our installation process begins with precise measurement and cutting of the baseboards and trim. We then install them using expert techniques, paying close attention to detail and ensuring a tight, secure fit. We also caulk and paint the baseboards and trim to complete the look. From the Craftsman style of Bixby Knolls to the modern designs in downtown Long Beach, we can match any architectural style.

Enhance the beauty and value of your home with USA Floor Contractor's baseboard and trim installation services. We are committed to providing exceptional quality and customer satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Precise measurement and cutting of baseboards and trim.
Step 2: Careful installation of baseboards and trim, ensuring a tight fit.
Step 3: Caulking to seal gaps and create a seamless look.
Step 4: Painting or staining to match your décor.

faq.question: What types of baseboards and trim do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide variety of baseboards and trim, including wood, MDF, and PVC.

faq.question: Can you match the existing baseboards and trim in my home?
faq.answer: Yes, we can typically find a close match for your existing baseboards and trim. If an exact match is unavailable, we can discuss alternative options that complement your design.

faq.question: How long does baseboard and trim installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of baseboard and trim installation depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the project. Most projects can be completed in 1-2 days.

serviceAreas.content:
USA Floor Contractor is proud to serve the vibrant city of Los Angeles! From the classic Spanish Colonial Revival homes of the 1920s to modern architectural marvels, we understand the diverse flooring needs of LA residents. Whether you need tile repair in your historic bungalow or hardwood floor refinishing in your contemporary condo, our expert team is here to help. We offer a wide range of flooring services, including installation, repair, and refinishing, using only the highest quality materials.

Los Angeles' warm, dry climate is perfect for hardwood floors, but it can also be tough on them. Our refinishing services can restore your hardwood to its original beauty, protecting it from the elements and extending its lifespan. We also specialize in tile repair, addressing issues like cracks, chips, and loose tiles to keep your floors looking their best. Trust USA Floor Contractor to enhance the beauty and value of your Los Angeles home with our exceptional flooring services.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles, with its diverse architecture like the 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival homes, experiences a warm, dry climate year-round, influencing flooring choices and maintenance.

Pasadena's warm and dry climate is ideal for many flooring materials, but it can also lead to wear and tear over time. Our expert team can assess your flooring needs and provide tailored solutions, whether you need to restore the original luster of your hardwood floors or repair damaged tiles in your kitchen or bathroom. reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: I had a few cracked tiles in my kitchen, and USA Floor Contractor did an amazing job repairing them. They matched the existing tile perfectly, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our hardwood floors were looking dull and scratched, so we hired USA Floor Contractor to refinish them. The floors look brand new! There were a couple of minor communication issues, but overall, we're very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: USA Floor Contractor installed laminate flooring in our living room, and it looks fantastic. The installation was quick and professional, and the price was very reasonable. Would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: We had USA Floor Contractor install vinyl flooring in our bathroom, and we couldn't be happier. The flooring is waterproof and looks great. The installers were very professional and courteous.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: USA Floor Contractor leveled our floors before installing new tile. They did a great job ensuring a smooth and even surface. There was a bit of a delay, but the quality of the work was excellent.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: The team at USA Floor Contractor installed new baseboards and trim throughout our entire house. Their attention to detail was impressive, and the finished product looks amazing. Highly recommend!
